title: Code Review Companion Inside State
description: The agent's own view of its lifecycle. Free-form `data` payload for scratch notes (briefing, current task id, in-session findings list, harness health). Status enum is the documented contract — runtime validation is best-effort.

status.description: Lifecycle status. boot → orienting (one-shot orient task) → idle. Per task: idle → reading → reviewing → reporting → idle. On stop: idle → stopping → exit.

data.description: Free-form scratch — current task id, files being read, partial findings count, briefing summary, harness health, heartbeatAt timestamp.
